signals.raw: **Warsh's confirmation status** — As of April 14, 2026, prediction markets indicated a 62% likelihood that Powell would depart the Board of Governors in 2026[2], but his formal confirmation has not yet occurred in the available information.

signals.headline: **Powell's decision on remaining as a governor** — Powell stated in March 2026 that he would remain as a Board member un
signals.raw: **Powell's decision on remaining as a governor** — Powell stated in March 2026 that he would remain as a Board member until the DOJ investigation into Federal Reserve renovation projects reaches resolution[2], but no resolution has been announced.
